Biography
Biography
Madison Barton is a graduate admissions counselor at the Khoury College of Computer Sciences at Northeastern University’s Arlington, Virginia campus. She earned her bachelor’s in political science from the University of Central Florida and her master’s in Global Studies and International Relations from Northeastern University. She enjoys helping students find their passion and making their dreams a reality.
Prior to joining Northeastern, Barton taught with Teach for America for four years in K-12.
Barton grew up in Orlando, Florida.
